provisions.title: Full text
provisions.content:
TRUSTS AND TRUSTEES ACT (REGISTRATION OF
NOTARIES TO ACT AS QUALIFIED PERSONS)

[ L.S.331.05

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 331.05
REGOLAMENTI DWAR TRUSTS AND TRUSTEES
ACT (REGISTRATION OF NOTARIES TO ACT
AS QUALIFIED PERSONS)*
6 ta’ Jannar, 2015
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 14 tal-2015.

*Dawn ir regolamenti ġre ippubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.

1
